name: knip
purpose: Dead-code, unused-file, unused-export, and unused-dependency detection.
licenseEvidence: npm registry metadata from `npm view knip version license repository.url --json` reported license `ISC` and repository `git+https://github.com/webpro-nl/knip.git`.
wellKnownEvidence: Knip is a dedicated TypeScript/JavaScript dead-code and unused dependency detector.
